channel.description: Recent content in Cache on robk.uk

item.title: Solutions Architect: Serverless
item.description: Serverless is a new paradigm in which the developers don’t have to manage servers anymore… They just deploy code…

item.title: Solutions Architect: CloudFront & Global Accelerator
item.description: Associate-level extension of the CloudFront & Global Accelerator Section from AWS Cloud Practitioner Series.

item.title: Solutions Architect: RDS, Aurora, Elasticache

item.title: AWS Global Infrastructure
item.description: A Global Application is an application deployed in multiple geographies. On AWS this could be Regions and / or Edge Locations….
